---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what you want. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?
     Include links to relevant Kubernetes KEPs, Go kubelet behaviour, or upstream issues if applicable. -->

## Proposed design

<!-- How might this work? Describe the approach at a high level.
     If you have a concrete implementation in mind, sketch the crate/module it would live in
     (see CONTRIBUTING.md for the architecture overview). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, links to upstream Kubernetes docs, etc. -->

---

**Before submitting**, please check:
- [ ] I searched [existing issues](../../issues) and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand the contribution workflow.
